news.t: ProShares Reduces Fees for S&P 500 Ex-Sector ETFs

holdings.infoBox: SPXE is an equity ETF with a total of 483 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.05%, Apple at 7.03%, Microsoft at 4.55%, Amazon.com at 3.75%, and Alphabet at 3.45%.

overview.description: The ProShares S&P 500 Ex-Energy ETF (SPXE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Ex-Energy index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of US large- and mid-cap stocks, excluding firms in the energy sector. SPXE was launched on Sep 22, 2015 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: ProShares Reduces Fees for S&P 500 Ex-Sector ETFs
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares has lowered the fees on its suite of S&P 500 Ex-Sector ETFs, which allow investors to own the S&P 500 without an unwanted economic sector.
